utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) destination: specified as Prague, Czech Republic — complete. 2) travel_dates: specified with exact dates and duration — complete. 3) transportation: flight details with costs — airline class, routes, dates/times, flight numbers, booking reference, seats, total cost provided — complete. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs — hotel name, rating, room type, dates, reservation code, cost — complete. 5) activities: selected activities with costs — activity names, dates/times, reservations, costs — complete. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs — restaurant reservation with date/time, party size, allergy note, reservation code, cost — complete. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown and tie to overall budget — itemized and grand total vs budget — complete.
